targets.rawSql:
WITH
  toDate('${march_start}') AS start_date,
  toDate('${march_end}') AS end_date
SELECT
  publisher_id,
  any(publisher_name) AS publisher_name,
  round(sum(net_revenue), 2) AS db_march_revenue,
  multiIf(
    publisher_id = 2800, toFloat64(${manual_2800}),
    publisher_id = 2948, toFloat64(${manual_2948}),
    publisher_id = 2947, toFloat64(${manual_2947}),
    0
  ) AS manual_march_revenue,
  round(
    sum(net_revenue) -
    multiIf(
      publisher_id = 2800, toFloat64(${manual_2800}),
      publisher_id = 2948, toFloat64(${manual_2948}),
      publisher_id = 2947, toFloat64(${manual_2947}),
      0
    ),
    2
  ) AS variance,
  round(
    sum(net_revenue) /
    nullIf(
      multiIf(
        publisher_id = 2800, toFloat64(${manual_2800}),
        publisher_id = 2948, toFloat64(${manual_2948}),
        publisher_id = 2947, toFloat64(${manual_2947}),
        0
      ),
      0
    ) * 100,
    2
  ) AS db_pct_of_manual
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE date >= start_date
  AND date < end_date
  AND publisher_id IN (2800, 2948, 2947)
GROUP BY publisher_id
ORDER BY publisher_id

panels.title: Manual invoice totals vs DB March totals

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  toDate('${march_start}') AS start_date,
  toDate('${march_end}') AS end_date
SELECT
  date,
  publisher_id,
  any(publisher_name) AS publisher_name,
  round(sum(net_revenue), 2) AS daily_revenue,
  count() AS row_count
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE date >= start_date
  AND date < end_date
  AND publisher_id IN (2800, 2948, 2947)
GROUP BY
  date,
  publisher_id
ORDER BY
  publisher_id,
  date

panels.title: March revenue by day and publisher

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  toDate('${march_start}') AS start_date,
  toDate('${march_end}') AS end_date,
  toFloat64(${manual_total}) AS manual_total
SELECT
  round(sum(net_revenue), 2) AS db_march_total,
  manual_total,
  round(sum(net_revenue) - manual_total, 2) AS variance,
  round(sum(net_revenue) / manual_total * 100, 2) AS db_pct_of_manual
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE date >= start_date
  AND date < end_date
  AND publisher_id IN (2800, 2948, 2947)

WITH
  toDate('${ref_today}') AS ref_today
SELECT
  publisher_id,
  any(publisher_name) AS publisher_name,
  round(sumIf(day_revenue, month = toStartOfMonth(ref_today)), 2) AS current_mtd,
  round(sumIf(day_revenue, month < toStartOfMonth(ref_today)), 2) AS previous_month,
  round(
    sumIf(day_revenue, month = toStartOfMonth(ref_today))
    / nullIf(countIf(month = toStartOfMonth(ref_today)), 0)
    * (dateDiff('day', toStartOfMonth(ref_today), toLastDayOfMonth(ref_today)) + 1),
    2
  ) AS projected
FROM
(
  SELECT
    publisher_id,
    publisher_name,
    date,
    toStartOfMonth(date) AS month,
    sum(net_revenue) AS day_revenue
  FROM analytics.publisher_daily
  WHERE date >= toStartOfMonth(ref_today) - INTERVAL 1 MONTH
    AND date < ref_today
    AND publisher_id IN (2800, 2948, 2947)
  GROUP BY
    publisher_id,
    publisher_name,
    date
)
GROUP BY publisher_id
ORDER BY publisher_id

panels.title: Dashboard logic reproduced using ref_today variable

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  latest_day AS (
    SELECT max(date) AS latest_date
    FROM analytics.publisher_daily
    WHERE date < today()
  )
SELECT
  (SELECT latest_date FROM latest_day) AS latest_date,
  publisher_id,
  any(publisher_name) AS publisher_name,
  round(sum(net_revenue), 2) AS yesterday_revenue
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE date = (SELECT latest_date FROM latest_day)
  AND publisher_id IN (2800, 2948, 2947)
GROUP BY publisher_id
ORDER BY publisher_id

panels.title: Latest loaded day revenue by publisher

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  toDate('${march_start}') AS start_date,
  toDate('${march_end}') AS end_date
SELECT
  ids.publisher_id,
  calendar.date,
  ifNull(round(rev.daily_revenue, 2), 0) AS daily_revenue
FROM
(
  SELECT arrayJoin([2800, 2948, 2947]) AS publisher_id
) AS ids
CROSS JOIN
(
  SELECT start_date + number AS date
  FROM numbers(dateDiff('day', start_date, end_date))
) AS calendar
LEFT JOIN
(
  SELECT
    publisher_id,
    date,
    sum(net_revenue) AS daily_revenue
  FROM analytics.publisher_daily
  WHERE date >= start_date
    AND date < end_date
    AND publisher_id IN (2800, 2948, 2947)
  GROUP BY
    publisher_id,
    date
) AS rev
ON ids.publisher_id = rev.publisher_id
AND calendar.date = rev.date
WHERE ifNull(rev.daily_revenue, 0) = 0
ORDER BY
  ids.publisher_id,
  calendar.date

WITH
  toDate('${march_start}') AS start_date,
  toDate('${march_end}') AS end_date
SELECT
  publisher_id,
  publisher_name,
  min(date) AS first_seen,
  max(date) AS last_seen,
  uniqExact(date) AS active_days,
  count() AS row_count,
  round(sum(net_revenue), 2) AS revenue
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE date >= start_date
  AND date < end_date
  AND publisher_id IN (2800, 2948, 2947)
GROUP BY
  publisher_id,
  publisher_name
ORDER BY
  publisher_id,
  revenue DESC

panels.title: Publisher names seen under target IDs

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  toDate('${march_start}') AS start_date,
  toDate('${march_end}') AS end_date
SELECT
  publisher_id,
  publisher_name,
  round(sum(net_revenue), 2) AS march_revenue,
  uniqExact(date) AS active_days,
  count() AS row_count
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE date >= start_date
  AND date < end_date
  AND publisher_id NOT IN (2800, 2948, 2947)
  AND
  (
    positionCaseInsensitive(publisher_name, 'bright') > 0
    OR positionCaseInsensitive(publisher_name, 'bcom') > 0
    OR positionCaseInsensitive(publisher_name, 'espot') > 0
    OR positionCaseInsensitive(publisher_name, 'iemerge') > 0
  )
GROUP BY
  publisher_id,
  publisher_name
ORDER BY march_revenue DESC

panels.title: Related Brightcom / Bcom / eSpot / iEmerge rows outside target IDs

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfMonth(date) AS month,
  publisher_id,
  any(publisher_name) AS publisher_name,
  round(sum(net_revenue), 2) AS revenue,
  uniqExact(date) AS active_days,
  count() AS row_count
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE date >= toDate('${march_start}')
  AND date < toDate('${compare_end}')
  AND publisher_id IN (2800, 2948, 2947)
GROUP BY
  month,
  publisher_id
ORDER BY
  month,
  publisher_id

panels.title: March / April revenue comparison by publisher

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  toDate('${march_start}') AS start_date,
  toDate('${march_end}') AS end_date
SELECT
  line_name,
  round(gross_revenue, 2) AS db_gross_revenue,
  threshold,
  round(gross_revenue - threshold, 2) AS overage,
  rate_per_1000,
  round((gross_revenue - threshold) / 1000, 3) AS raw_qty,
  round((gross_revenue - threshold) / 1000, 0) AS rounded_qty,
  round(round((gross_revenue - threshold) / 1000, 0) * rate_per_1000, 2) AS calculated_invoice_amount
FROM
(
  SELECT
    'Brightcom / iEmerge' AS line_name,
    sumIf(net_revenue, publisher_id IN (2800, 2948)) AS gross_revenue,
    toFloat64(${threshold_brightcom}) AS threshold,
    toFloat64(${rate_brightcom}) AS rate_per_1000
  FROM analytics.publisher_daily
  WHERE date >= start_date
    AND date < end_date

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'eSpot' AS line_name,
    sumIf(net_revenue, publisher_id = 2947) AS gross_revenue,
    toFloat64(${threshold_espot}) AS threshold,
    toFloat64(${rate_espot}) AS rate_per_1000
  FROM analytics.publisher_daily
  WHERE date >= start_date
    AND date < end_date
)

panels.title: Revenue share using DB March totals

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  line_name,
  gross_revenue,
  threshold,
  round(gross_revenue - threshold, 2) AS overage,
  rate_per_1000,
  round((gross_revenue - threshold) / 1000, 3) AS raw_qty,
  round((gross_revenue - threshold) / 1000, 0) AS rounded_qty,
  round(round((gross_revenue - threshold) / 1000, 0) * rate_per_1000, 2) AS calculated_invoice_amount
FROM
(
  SELECT
    'Brightcom / iEmerge' AS line_name,
    toFloat64(${manual_2800}) + toFloat64(${manual_2948}) AS gross_revenue,
    toFloat64(${threshold_brightcom}) AS threshold,
    toFloat64(${rate_brightcom}) AS rate_per_1000

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'eSpot' AS line_name,
    toFloat64(${manual_2947}) AS gross_revenue,
    toFloat64(${threshold_espot}) AS threshold,
    toFloat64(${rate_espot}) AS rate_per_1000
)

panels.title: Revenue share using manual March totals

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  publisher_id,
  any(publisher_name) AS publisher_name,
  round(sum(net_revenue), 2) AS revenue,
  min(date) AS min_revenue_date,
  max(date) AS max_revenue_date,
  uniqExact(date) AS active_days,
  count() AS row_count
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE publisher_id IN (2800, 2948, 2947)
  AND date >= toDate('${march_start}')
  AND date < toDate('${march_end}')
GROUP BY publisher_id
ORDER BY publisher_id
